programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Betty asks her neighbours to babysit, but Sid is less than keen to help. Comedy, starring Sid James and Patsy Rowlands

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George celebrates his 24th wedding anniversary by presenting Mildred with a carriage clock. However, he has purchased it cut-price from a dubious source, and when the Fourmiles return from holiday they find their home burgled, and among the missing items is a carriage clock. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective's friend Sir Charles Cartwright (guest star Martin Shaw) hosts a cocktail party at his home in Cornwall, where an amiable local priest chokes to death on his drink. There seems to be no motive for murder, and no trace of poison found in the victim's glass, but weeks later, when Sir Charles's doctor friend Sir Bartholomew Strange dies in similar circumstances, he and Poirot team up to investigate. Drama, with Art Malik, Jane Asher and Anna Carteret, and David Suchet in the title role

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The residents of Aidensfield are terrorised by a blackmailer and Sergeant Merton is less than impressed by the investigative methods of the handsome newcomer PC Rob Walker. Meanwhile, Vernon embarks on a venture in the prestigious world of publishing, with the help of David and Bernie. Jonathan Kerrigan stars

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Albert flirts with Lisa. Frank plans to hold a party to celebrate his freedom. Linda has a big announcement for Biff. Mandy and Alan plan a leaving do for Terry

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles feud from the previous night continues. Frank shows Chris his plans for the health farm. Biff and Linda are the only mourners at Ron's funeral

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Platts have an emotional reunion with Nick. Andy tells Curly he cannot cope with the way Anne organises him. Don is not happy to hear the garage has been sold to Kevin and Tony

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Don tells everyone that Kevin and Tony are devious. Derek is dismayed when one of his wellies is stolen from the Rovers. Des is thrilled when Claire and Becky move in with him

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A guest at a village Halloween party boasts of having witnessed a murder years previously - and later meets a grisly end in keeping with the macabre spirit of the occasion. Arriving to investigate, Poirot delves back into the annals of local life - and uncovers a series of mysterious deaths, any one of which could have a bearing on the present case. David Suchet, Amelia Bullmore and Zoe Wanamaker star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The residents of Aidensfield are terrorised by a blackmailer and Sergeant Merton is less than impressed by the investigative methods of the handsome newcomer PC Rob Walker. Meanwhile, Vernon embarks on a venture in the prestigious world of publishing, with the help of David and Bernie. Jonathan Kerrigan stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A woman's body is discovered in Captain Hastings' garage on Bonfire Night. It transpires that the deceased was due to marry an MP - and although the evidence suggests suicide, the Belgian detective suspects foul play. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson star

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Hypochondriac Malcolm Rayner is struggling with his breathing and Martin asks him if he has ever worked with asbestos. Penhale then causes pandemonium by putting up warning notices about the substance's harmful properties throughout the village. Meanwhile, Bert pops the question to Jennifer, and Ruth finds fault with Al's business proposal. Guest starring Christopher Fairbank (Auf Wiedersehen, Pet)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The doctor becomes convinced something is wrong with him following a conversation with his mother, and Louisa's attempts at getting him to open up about the loss of his father prove futile. Mrs Tishell goes to the surgery for advice regarding a pain in her jaw, only to find herself falling in love with Martin all over again. Elsewhere, Al receives a visit from two military policemen who are trying to track down Mike Pruddy

programme.title: Cleaning Up
programme.desc: Swanny entrusts Sam to make a large investment for him, and she goes to desperate lengths to pull off the extraordinarily risky task. As Sam revels in her new persona, Dave starts to notice the change in her, and Glynn finds out that Sam is still in financial trouble. Meanwhile, Jess and Mina are both put under pressure to come clean as the investigation into illegal activity in the office comes to a head, but it is Sam who takes the wrap. Starring Sheridan Smith, Jade Anouka and Matthew McNulty

programme.title: Cleaning Up
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Sam's world falls apart when her landlady returns with some devastating news, and she is forced to face the disastrous consequences of her actions. Coming clean to Dave could solve Sam's problems, but she risks losing her family. Meanwhile, Jess is left heartbroken when her business plan falls through. With no job and no home, Sam moves in with Jess and together they decide to concoct a brilliant but dangerous idea to try and get their lives back on track

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a retired university fellow leads to a complex investigation for Morse and Lewis as they piece together a story of student suicide, drugs and the mysterious dismissal of a loyal college scout. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Phyllis Logan, Gabrielle Lloyd, Amanda Ryan and Tony Haygarth

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid takes a little exercise and Trevor decides to join him. Seventies sitcom, starring Sid James and Anthony Jackson

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A cleaner is found dead in her home and suspicion immediately falls upon her lodger, who is arrested and convicted of her murder. It appears to be an open-and-shut case, but Superintendent Spence begins to question the man's guilt and invites Poirot to help uncover the identity of the real killer. The Belgian sleuth teams up with crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) as he tries to crack the case. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Richard Hope, Joe Absolom, Amanda Root, Sian Phillips and Raquel Cassidy

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Johnny's past returns to haunt him when Scott tells Jenny all about the crime they committed more than 40 years ago, while temperatures rise at Speed Daal when Geoff turns up for work. Having returned from their meeting, Abi thanks Peter for his support, but Debbie is watching from a distance, with her suspicions heightened

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alya is furious to find an alcohol delivery on the doorstep of Speed Daal and refuses point blank to let Geoff buy her out of the business, leading him to resort to sabotage. David arranges to take Shona for a walk, but it doesn't go quite to plan, while Daniel apologises to Ray for causing a scene in the bistro

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Geoff plays the victim once again, but Tim wonders if his dad is as innocent as he makes out, while Mary and Cathy discuss Dev's money problems. Daniel admits to Adam that he's been paying Nicky to dress up as Sinead so he could pretend she's still alive, and David assures Shona that she's improving all the time

programme.title: The Great St Trinian's Train Robbery (1966)
programme.desc: A crook and his cronies stash the money from a train heist in a deserted old mansion, planning to recover it in good time. However, several years later, when the thieves arrive to collect their loot, they discover the building has been turned into a school for girls where the pupils have become infamous for their escapades. Comedy, starring Frankie Howerd, Dora Bryan, Reg Varney and George Cole

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A woman's body is discovered in Captain Hastings' garage on Bonfire Night. It transpires that the deceased was due to marry an MP - and although the evidence suggests suicide, the Belgian detective suspects foul play. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Schoolgirl Jennifer Sutcliffe becomes embroiled in a mystery when priceless jewels are hidden among her belongings. The precious stones once belonged to a prince who fell foul of a revolution, and now his cousin is a pupil at the same school as Jennifer, where Poirot finds himself drawn into the unlikely situation and realises nothing is quite what it seems. David Suchet stars as the Belgian sleuth, with Harriet Walter and Claire Skinner

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Oxford's last-surviving all-female college is holding a reunion to bid farewell to one of its most prominent professors. However, the evening leads to tragedy when a guest is found murdered, and Lewis is convinced the killing is connected to an attack that occurred at the same institution 10 years previously. The detective calls in his former DS, Alison McLennan, to help with the investigation, but the case takes a twist when two more bodies turn up. Crime drama, guest starring Juliet Stevenson and Saskia Reeves, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The crime drama returns, with Barnaby and Winter joined on the year's first case by a new pathologist, Petra Antonescu (Anamaria Marinca). A woman slips away from a Jane Austen re-enactment in full costume, only to be stabbed to death in the woods - her murder being recorded by a camera drone. The victim is discovered to be an undercover journalist, who had some unusual questions to ask about the village and the country house where the historical event took place. Guest starring Claire Skinner and Samuel West

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Joyce Barnaby swerves off the road into a ditch, convinced she has hit someone, but nobody is found injured and Tom thinks she has imagined it. However, when a local historian discovers the body of a librarian in a nearby cemetery, Joyce blames herself for the man's death, leading her husband into a spooky investigation to find the real killer on the loose in the haunted village of March Magna. Guest starring Danny Webb (The Bill), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: When a student from a prestigious all-female college is found dead, Will and Geordie infiltrate the murky world of campus politics and university societies to find the killer. Navigating strange initiations, raucous parties - and with investigative journalist, Ellie Harding, hot on their heels - they need to use every advantage at their disposal to unravel the mystery. Cathy's ambitions for a life of her own start to test the delicate family balance, while fresh from a spell with Daniel in Marrakech, Leonard finds it hard to acclimatise to life back in Grantchester. Robson Green and Tom Brittney star

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: After Will and Leonard witness a deadly and deliberate hit-and-run, Geordie traces the car to a pair of decidedly dysfunctional brothers, whose house lies far off the beaten path. The victim's wife, his employee and the two brothers are all damaged characters caught in a web of lies and betrayals - and it's not just secrets hiding within the siblings' grounds. Back at home, Will and Geordie both struggle as unwelcome guests look set to stay - Will's mum Amelia seems to have found a carbon copy of his late father in her new beau. Meanwhile, a new television set lands in the vicarage - just in time for Eurovision. Robson Green, Tom Brittney and Al Weaver star

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The murder of a caretaker has been so carefully planned and executed that the police are left without a single piece of evidence. Adding to the mystery is the fact that the crime is laid out in detail in a manual purchased three weeks earlier in the victim's name. Brooks and Casey eventually track down the killer, who confesses, but the trial is put in jeopardy by a canny defence lawyer. Guest starring Toby Stephens

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A murder inquiry is launched when the police are alerted to shocking internet footage showing a teenage girl being attacked and shot. The investigation is hindered by the lack of a body, but the video provides enough clues to eventually put a name to the victim and track down her killers. However, a vow of silence between the defendants means Jake and Alesha face one of their toughest court battles yet

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team tries to juggle three cases over the course of one day, beginning at 6am when Brooks and Casey are called to a crime scene where a barman has been shot dead in his car. Then, a family dispute leads to murder, and the frenetic morning takes an unexpected turn when an allegation of police intimidation is made against one of the officers. Bradley Walsh and Paul Nicholls star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth takes a break on the island of Rhodes, where an English beauty draws attention by flirting with fellow guests at the Palace Hotel. When she is found murdered, her husband is immediately suspected, but Poirot quickly deduces there is more to the case than a simple crime of passion. Whodunit, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Mike takes up photography, and persuades Sid to let him use the old garage for his new hobby. Family comedy, starring Sid James, Diana Coupland and Robin Stewart

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Paul is kidnapped and Harry and the Contessa are forced to assist in a theft in order to save him. Drama, guest starring Peter Bowles, with Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. He disapproves of his daughter's villainous boyfriend, and Regan suspects he is being exploited to help break the romantic union. However, an even darker plan is being hatched, with the daughter an innocent pawn in a robbery. Kenny Lynch and Derek Francis guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Moriarty seeks revenge on Holmes for foiling his plan to sell the Mona Lisa, and the pair ultimately fight their final battle at the Reichenbach Falls in Switzerland. Jeremy Brett stars as the titular hero, with David Burke making his final appearance as Dr Watson and Eric Porter as Moriarty

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed finds himself prime suspect when foreign agents are suddenly systematically killed off, so initiates a truce with his Russian opposite and together they work to discover the identity of the killers

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur buys a large consignment of wine, supposedly brewed by monks. Before he can collect his order it is impounded, but he sneaks into a warehouse and retrieves it anyway. However, a disastrous tasting session at the Winchester reveals the product to be 'corked' and undrinkable and when he and Ray return it in the hope of a later refund they get locked in. George Cole and Gary Webster star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle learn an assassin has been hired to murder one of the delegates at an anti-terrorist conference and set about discovering the identity of the killer's target. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage five of the most prestigious race on the calendar, featuring a flat 183km route from Gap to Privas. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Harry is stunned in a car accident and regains consciousness to discover the Contessa, who was travelling with him, has disappeared. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt

programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are assigned to protect Cowley's former girlfriend, now a controversial evangelist, from an assassin, but are unaware that the would-be hitman is right under their nose. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Monster Carp

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: A reprogrammed killing machine is sent back in time to the 20th century to protect John Connor, a teenage boy whose destiny is to save the human race. programme.title: The Professionals

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at homes by the sea as they continue to celebrate two decades of the property search programme. Inyang and Gregor have sold up in Glasgow and want to move somewhere they have never even visited - Cornwall. London fashion designer Shane has his heart set on the Kent coast, young-at-heart pensioners Peggy and Jon are swapping Derby for the Norfolk coast and Jemma and Graham, who moved back from LA, are struggling to find their dream seaside home in Essex

programme.title: Council House Britain
programme.desc: Documentary following frontline council workers and residents in Southwark, south London, one of the biggest housing associations in the country. Housing officer Charmain helps a man who has lost his key, deals with a window cleaner performing a high-wire act and worries about a vulnerable resident who is not answering his door. Andy from pest control tackles an empty flat with a fridge full of cockroaches

programme.title: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: The documentary follows the Crown Prosecution Service and detectives from Hampshire's Major Crime team as they struggle to prosecute a man accused of killing a 13-year-old schoolgirl - a case made more difficult by budget cuts. The film also follows a Southampton detective and CPS lawyer as they team up to charge a man accused of exposing himself to a six-year-old boy

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Wichita, Kansas, where he tries to revitalise Fetch Bistro, which offers diners a place to eat alongside their canine companions. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to update the interior and pare down the menu and teach the staff the new dishes. They plan a pared-down menu featuring new dishes and a more consistent approach, with their customers asked to come back the next day to assess the changes. What will they think of the improvements to the restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: The Yorkshire Jobcentre
programme.desc: Lisa, 38, has just been released from prison and is going for an interview as a work coach at the Jobcentre, and hopes this will give her the second chance she desperately needs. Ex-heroin-user Wayne is desperate to turn his life around and has been referred to work coach Pip on the social justice team, while 48-year-old Justin has worked for many years in marketing and media, but has turned to the public employment service for advice about becoming a self-employed taxi driver

programme.title: Inside Missguided: Made in Manchester
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at one of Britain's biggest online fashion retailer's offices to explore what life is like for their young, female-dominated workforce at their offices in the heart of Manchester. In the final episode, cameras follow the Missguided team as they prepare for one of the most important days of the year, Black Friday. To hit their targets, the brand are launching their first ever ski wear range, and lead creative Treasure is sent to Austria for a photoshoot in sub-zero temperatures

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Adnan Sarwar follows the trail of migrants dicing with death as they attempt to cross the frozen Alpine peaks marking the border between Italy and France. Braving altitudes of up to 2,500 metres and temperatures as low as minus 20, many have died in their attempt to seek safety, having been denied asylum in Italy or threatened with deportation back to the countries from which they fled

programme.title: Lodgers for Codgers
programme.desc: With the majority of under-30s struggling to get on the property ladder and millions of over-60s sitting on empty rooms, young and old tackle Britain's housing crisis by trialling a unique solution - moving in together and seeing how they get along. In this edition, 21-year-old poet Marvell leaves his east London council house to lodge with retired couple Lynne and John in their converted chapel in the Somerset town of Glastonbury. Meanwhile, in Birmingham, 20-year-old Sophie co-habits with no-nonsense pensioner Eunice. How she will cope living under her landlord's strict house rules remains to be seen

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with Lee Mack and Victoria Coren Mitchell taking on Alan Carr and Dane Baptiste. Sam Simmons joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Jon Richardson: Old Man Tour
programme.desc: A chance to see a live performance recorded at Blackpool's historic Grand Theatre, on what was the final night of the comedian's sell-out, 158-date UK and Ireland tour. Here, Jon takes to the stage to comment - and generally complain - on topics including parenthood, Brexit and haircuts. The question of why nobody but him can correctly load a dishwasher is also raised. Alas, Jon can offer no solutions to all the problems he identifies, but nevertheless provides plenty of mirth as he fails to reach a viable conclusion to his grouses

programme.title: Sex in Lockdown: Keep Sh*gging and Carry On
programme.desc: A mix of faces from across the nation join Anna Richardson as she gets to grips with all things love, sex and romance, delving into the ways sex in Britain has altered since its people have been ordered to stay indoors. She also reveals the results of a specially commissioned survey to find out exactly what the Great British Public have been getting up to during lockdown

programme.title: Sin City: A Dame to Kill For (2014)
programme.desc: Compilation of four stories of crime and betrayal set in a dangerous city. An honourable thug dishes out some vigilante justice, a private eye falls for the machinations of a femme fatale, a gambler gets in over his head, and a stripper plots revenge. Crime thriller sequel based on the comic-book series, starring Eva Green, Mickey Rourke, Jessica Alba and Josh Brolin

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Medical insurance boss Zac Kwintner hosts the first dinner party in Gloucestershire, making a traditional Jewish chicken soup, steak fondue and a rich chocolate orange tart. However, handing over cooking duties to his house staff does not go down well with the guests - a mature student, a travel agent, a web designer and a council worker

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mature student Gerry Hill hosts the second party in Gloucestershire, and hopes to spice up the competition with an Egyptian-themed feast. However, his ambitious menu prompts mixed reactions from the guests, and things go from bad to worse when dinner-table banter turns to insults, and one of the diners is forced to go home early

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Travel agent Kayleigh Hunt hosts the third dinner party in Gloucestershire, but her Moroccan-themed menu fails to impress the diners when she forgets to cook the main course. With all her guests hungry, she resorts to dressing up in her favourite outfits to keep them entertained

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Web designer Marc Harris hosts the penultimate dinner party in Gloucestershire. He is confident his Spanish menu will win over his fellow diners and is determined to put a halt to Zac's rude behaviour, but his plans go downhill when he makes a mess of his starter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Council worker Ameena Cott hosts the final dinner party in Gloucestershire, and hopes to impress with a glamorous evening, which includes colour co-ordinating her dress to match her dog's outfit and making a birdcage centrepiece from a melon. She also tries to win her guests' affections with electric pulse-pad treatment and strawberry face masks, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Supershoppers
programme.desc: Helen Skelton and Sabrina Grant reveal ways to make big savings on takeaways, supermarket deliveries and eating out, with the team investigating restaurant discount cards. There is also advice on getting the most from online supermarket shopping, a look at an app that offers leftover food for a discount price, and tips on buying coffee on the high street

programme.title: Fifteen to One

programme.desc: Olympic gymnast Claudia Fragapane practices emergency stops, while former Pussycat Doll Kimberly Wyatt is joined in her lesson by her husband Max and daughter Willow

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp enters the shortbread competition at the Chagford Show in Devon, as she tries to woo the judges with some creative takes on the classic treat, including using rosemary and lavender as ingredients

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp enters the shortbread competition at the Chagford Show in Devon, as she tries to woo the judges with some creative takes on the classic treat, including using rosemary and lavender as ingredients

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is too ill to take Ally to a pyjama party, so Ray reluctantly agrees to do the honours. Unfortunately it means coming face to face with Peggy, an old enemy who physically assaulted him during a charity event

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wonders how Ray would cope if she met an untimely end, and picks an attractive friend to replace her as his new wife - but cannot help being hurt by his enthusiastic response to the idea

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is forced to pretend he is Mel's husband at a party, and Frasier hires a butler who spoils everyone in the household. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio shrink begins to date the attractive attorney who's defending him against Donny - who was jilted at the altar by Daphne - although he suspects that she is unfairly running up his bill

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howard's old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is shocked to discover Principal Skinner in a passionate clinch with Mrs Krabappel at a birthday party and finds himself being used as a highly reluctant go-between in their illicit relationship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart has the bright idea of taking out a credit card in Santa's Little Helper's name and orders a fully trained pedigree collie. Unfortunately, he has trouble keeping up the payments and soon receives a visit from bailiffs wanting to repossess all his purchases

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes pity on a bankrupt Mr Burns and encourages him to build a recycling centre, hoping it will get him back on his feet - but makes the mistake of underestimating his ruthlessness. Featuring the guest voice of wrestler Bret Hart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge begins work as a church volunteer and restores Reverend Lovejoy's faith in his vocation, while Homer is baffled to discover his image printed on a box of Japanese washing powder

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns hires a hard-working, conscientious new employee, who takes an instant dislike to the slobbish Homer and sets about trying to humiliate him. Meanwhile, Bart buys an abandoned factory for a dollar at a government auction and gives Milhouse the job of nightwatchman

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Meudon Hotel in Falmouth, Cornwall, where owner Gaye Woods hopes to impress rivals Tim and Mikey, Joan and Geoff, and Sue and Chris

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Malborough in Devon and The Royal Oak pub, run by laid-back owner Tim Heap, and the basic rooms are a hit for some, while others question the cleanliness

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Angel Guest House in Tiverton, Devon, where owners Chris and Sue Holliday have created a homespun experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Expectations are high as the guests arrive at the Compton Swan in Berkshire, after co-owner Joan McGowan revealed she was named Ireland's Businesswoman of the Year

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day in the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: In the first of a new series, Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team treat a giant Newfoundland puppy with a painful knee and shoulder. What appears straightforward quickly turns into a much bigger concern, and Noel and his team are challenged to invent not one but two new implants for her. Meanwhile, a rescue black Labrador called Moogi is in need of treatment for severe elbow arthritis, and a golden Labrador born with a deformed front paw is offered a bionic solution in the form of a unique, custom-made prosthesis

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Queer Eye's Tan France, actress Caroline Quentin, comedian Joel Dommett and British tennis number one Johanna Konta take part in the charity culinary challenge, under the watchful eye of hosts Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding and judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. For the signature challenge, they must prepare a batch of classic eclairs, while the technical round will test their skills with puff pastry. Finally, for the showstopper challenge, they must immortalise their greatest fear in cake form

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Olliers from Stenhousemuir in Scotland, where husband and wife Steven and Mhairi are undecided whether to sell their home or renovate it. Kirstie produces a plan that revolutionises the whole house, while Phil is tasked to find them a home that's a short throw away from their beloved cricket club

programme.title: Channel 4 News

programme.title: Jimmy's Big Bee Rescue
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jimmy Doherty goes in search of the Secretary of State for Environment, in the hope of gaining government support for his plans. The programme examines how a radical transformation of the British countryside is needed to create a more bee-friendly environment, and reveals the results of the first episode's efforts to boost bee numbers in Peterborough

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back (2016)

Director Edward Zwick's blockbusting action thriller sequel based on Lee Child's novel, starring Tom Cruise, Cobie Smulders, Danika Yarosh and Aldis Hodge

Superhero adventure prequel, starring Hugh Jackman and Liev Schreiber

programme.title: Wild Britain
programme.desc: Cameras follow some of the animals that thrive in inner-city environments across the country. Urban foxes did not exist in Britain until the 1930s, but now these animals inhabit 90% of towns and cities and take residence in built-up living quarters. Meanwhile, cameras observe families of hedgehogs thriving in unkempt gardens, and peregrine falcons nesting in some on London's tallest buildings

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Ajay Singal is visited by Cyril, an 89-year-old who has a mischievous sense of humour and a loving family around him. Yet when it is time to sleep at night, he gets overwhelmed with anxiety and cannot settle. Can his GP get to the bottom of his problem? Paul comes in complaining of an excruciating pain in his throat, diabetic Paula worries about a sudden dip in her blood sugar levels and railway worker Darren shows Dr Qamar some unsightly lumps on his back

programme.title: Elephant Hospital
programme.desc: The work of a Thailand hospital devoted solely to treating elephants. The two-part documentary reveals the day-to-day challenges of dealing with supersized patients suffering everything from deadly viruses to cuts and parasites. It also shows how the facility teaches baby elephants new commands and even turns elephant poo into fertiliser

programme.title: Racism: My Story
programme.desc: One hundred days after the death of George Floyd, a number of black British people share their experiences of racism throughout the decades, including their treatment by police, workplace discrimination or on the streets. Contributors include actor and comedian Andi Osho, barrister and star of The Chase Shaun Wallace, Dawn Butler MP, Dr Janine Channer, football commentator and former player Mark Bright, nurse Neomi Bennett, youth mentor Sayce Holmes-Lewis, and author and journalist Yomi Adegoke

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red

programme.title: The Funny Thing About

programme.title: Inside Manchester's Midland Hotel
programme.desc: Documentary looking inside the famous venue, meeting the staff whose job it is to ensure its smooth running. Some high-profile guests check in and while attending to their needs, the staff also need to deal with all manner of potential disasters - from the boiler breaking down to having to turn people away at reception as beds can't be made. The staging of an ambitious doesn't get off to a good start when the bride and groom are over an hour late. On top of this, there are customer complaints about breakfast not being up to scratch, prompting a new manager to be drafted in

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Interviews with the people whose holidays ended in disaster. Highlights include Jody and Stacey Mortlock, whose dream honeymoon turned into a nightmare when the Covid-19 pandemic started. Their tour operator abandoned them in Egypt. As their hotel closed, they had to make a dash to the airport to get out of the country. Plus, the experiences of the Evans family, who booked a dream break in Cuba - but on arrival found smelly rooms and swimming pools doubling as toilets. With contributions by travel experts Danni Menzies, Scarlette Douglas, Jean Johansson and Simon Calder. Narrated by Nicki Chapman

programme.title: Posh Hotels with Sally & Nigel
programme.desc: Actors Sally Lindsay and Nigel Havers present a look at some of the United Kingdom's poshest hotels, providing insights into the lives of the staff who provide the five-star services and the guests who indulge in it. The first episode features The Berkeley in London, where Nigel works a housekeeping shift, a job that can entail pressing the contents of a guest's suitcase, and Sally shadows the hotel's esteemed florist, before helping the concierge answer the demands of the rich and famous. After the presenters have completed their duties, they sample the cocktails on offer and ride home in a Ferrari

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine the experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. Posters aimed at naming and shaming one of the residents of Withycombe, Somerset, for taking part in a government-backed badger cull result in him and his family being driven out by animal rights activists. In Woodford Green, north-east London, an ambitious house extension results in all light being blocked to one neighbouring property and huge cracks appearing in the other, while a Bournemouth woman ends up having a restraining order taken out against her after erecting a gated driveway before receiving official approval

programme.title: Live Gallagher Premiership Rugby Union
programme.desc: Harlequins v Bath (Kick-off 2.00pm). Coverage of the match from the 18th round of fixtures, which comes from The Stoop. The sides last met back in February when a brace of tries from England winger Ruaridh McConnochie helped Bath to a 19-12 home win at the Recreation Ground. However, even without fans present, Quins will be looking to make home advantage count on this occasion and start climbing up the table

programme.title: Secrets of the Royals
programme.desc: The Royal Family have always tried to project an immaculate image, but the Royal Servants reveals what goes on behind closed doors. Stories from the royal household's staff, include a cook revealing the Queen's surprisingly simple favourite treat, and a footman of the Queen Mother recounting his most embarrassing gaffe, involving wine and Princess Margaret. Plus, historian Kate Williams examines some of the most bizarre and shocking servant duties from ancient times

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: Comedian Susan Calman takes a lighthearted jaunt around her homeland to uncover the untold tales behind some of Scotland's most famous locations. She visits romantic and rugged locations, and takes an in-depth look at their history, people and exciting treasures, often receiving private tours of iconic Scottish spots and uncovering hidden secrets of the past and present. From quiet countryside to brooding coastlines, this love letter to Scotland demonstrates the best of what the country has to offer

programme.title: The Palace vs the Press: Royals Under Fire
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the relationship the younger members of the royal family have with the media, looking at the power game between a young royal generation who know how to give as good as they get and a press constantly pushing to regain the upper hand in their search for ever more tantalising stories

programme.title: Live Boxing
programme.desc: Samir Ziani v Alex Dilmaghani. Coverage of the bout for the EBU European Super Featherweight title, which comes from Production Park in South Kirkby. Londoner Dilmaghani's last contest was a draw 10 months ago when he drew with Francisco Fonseca, and he will now look to get back to winning ways against the experienced Frenchman, who made a successful defence of the title last October when he outpointed Faroukh Kourbanov

programme.title: Police Code Zero: Officer Under Attack
programme.desc: Programme exploring the rising number of assaults on police officers, revealing what they face in the line of duty, and the emotional toll these incidents take. In Southampton, a Friday night in town descends into violence, and Sergeant Nicolas Tucker is left helpless on the floor after he is punched. Elsewhere in County Durham, PC Caryn Fairburn is on shift when she and her colleague are asked to respond to an argument

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The broadcaster returns to find out how railways have been central to the history of four very different parts of the world. He begins by embarking on a journey across the Alps, starting in Vienna, before navigating one of the worst avalanche zones in the world. He then heads for St Moritz on a railway that was made possible in part by British holiday pioneer Thomas Cook, before boarding two steep cog railways to climb up the north face of the Eiger to reach the 'Roof of Europe'

programme.title: Wildlife SOS

programme.title: Divine Designs

programme.title: House Doctor

programme.title: Sword of Sherwood Forest (1960)
programme.desc: Legendary outlaw hero Robin Hood rallies his merry men to thwart a dastardly plan by the Sheriff of Nottingham to murder the Archbishop of Canterbury, who has denounced the sheriff's plot to confiscate another nobleman's land. Medieval adventure, starring Richard Greene, Peter Cushing, Niall MacGinnis, Richard Pasco, Sarah Branch and Oliver Reed

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask (1977)
programme.desc: The despotic king of France imprisons his identical twin and sees to it that he always wears a metal mask to avoid being identified, but musketeer D'Artagnan has a plan to restore the rightful heir to the throne. Swashbuckling adventure, based on the classic story by Alexandre Dumas, starring Richard Chamberlain in a dual role, with Patrick McGoohan, Louis Jourdan and Jenny Agutter

programme.title: Faintheart (2008)
programme.desc: Family man Richard finds solace from his humdrum life in the world of historical battle re-enactments. However, when his hobby sees him spend more time on the battlefield than at home, his wife leaves him for a gym instructor, forcing Richard to reassess his priorities. Romantic comedy, starring Eddie Marsan, Ewen Bremner, Jessica Hynes, Bronagh Gallagher, Tim Healy and Paul Nicholls

programme.title: Big Stone Gap (2014)
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed spinster finds her life shaken up after learning a long-buried family secret. Romantic comedy, starring Ashley Judd and Patrick Wilson

programme.title: Footloose (2011)
programme.desc: A teenager from Boston moves to a small conservative town, and discovers the council and a preacher have enforced a ban on loud music and dancing. He openly defies the harsh rules, revitalising the local youth and winning the heart of the reverend's daughter. Remake of the 1984 drama, with Kenny Wormald, Julianne Hough and Dennis Quaid

programme.title: American Ultra (2015)
programme.desc: Small-town store clerk and unmotivated stoner Mike is enjoying his life with girlfriend Phoebe when his world is suddenly turned upside down. He is unaware he is actually a highly trained, lethal government sleeper agent who has been targeted for assassination, forcing him to summon his inner action-hero in order to survive. Action comedy, starring Jesse Eisenberg and Kristen Stewart

programme.title: 47 Metres Down (2017)
programme.desc: Two sisters vacationing in Mexico are trapped in a shark cage at the bottom of the ocean. With less than an hour of oxygen left and great white sharks circling nearby, they must fight to survive. Horror, starring Mandy Moore, Claire Holt and Matthew Modine

programme.title: Pili (2017)
programme.desc: A Tanzanian woman with HIV works the land in a backbreaking job for a heartbreakingly low wage in order to feed her two children. But then an opportunity arises that could change Pili's life for the better. Director Leanne Welham's drama, starring Bello Rashid. In Swahili with English subtitles

programme.title: Lovelace (2013)
programme.desc: Biopic of 1970s adult film star Linda Lovelace, contrasting her glamorous reputation following the release of groundbreaking adult movie Deep Throat - which made her an international star - to the dark account of exploitation and abuse she revealed to the world years later. Starring Amanda Seyfried, Peter Sarsgaard, Sharon Stone and Robert Patrick

programme.title: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes (1953)
programme.desc: Lounge singers Lorelei and Dorothy embark on a transatlantic cruise to Paris in search of rich husbands. While Dorothy falls for a penniless man, Lorelei thinks she has found the millionaire of her dreams, only for his father to hire a private eye to spy on her and prove she is a gold-digger. Howard Hawks' musical comedy, starring Marilyn Monroe, Jane Russell, Charles Coburn and Elliott Reid

programme.title: Elephant Walk (1954)
programme.desc: A woman struggles to come to terms with her tea plantation owner husband's obsession with his dead father. Melodrama, starring Elizabeth Taylor, Peter Finch, Dana Andrews and Abraham Sofaer

programme.title: The Guns of Fort Petticoat (1957)
programme.desc: A lieutenant deserts after his commanding officer launches an unprovoked attack on a Comanche village during the Civil War. Realising that there are no soldiers in his home town to protect it from reprisals, he returns to train the local women to defend themselves. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Kathryn Grant, Hope Emerson and Jeff Donnell

programme.title: Gallipoli (1981)
programme.desc: Two patriotic Australians join the army to fight during the First World War. However, their youthful idealism is quickly eroded by the harsh reality of the conflict, and their friendship is tested to the very limits of endurance as they prepare for combat ahead of the pivotal battle of Gallipoli in Turkey. Drama, directed by Peter Weir, starring Mel Gibson, Mark Lee, Bill Kerr and David Argue

programme.title: Ride Along 2 (2016)
programme.desc: Excitable beat cop Ben longs to work alongside his fiancee's brother, hard-boiled detective James, who does not think he has what it takes. James decides to show Ben that he is not cut out for the job by recruiting him to help bring a drug dealer to justice. Comedy sequel, starring Ice Cube, Kevin Hart and Olivia Munn

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover

programme.title: Mandy (2018)
programme.desc: The lives of a couple in a secluded forest are shattered by a nightmarish cult and their demonic-biker henchmen, sending lumberjack Red Miller on a blood-soaked quest for vengeance. Fantasy horror, starring Nicolas Cage, Andrea Riseborough and Linus Roache

programme.title: Berberian Sound Studio (2012)
programme.desc: An introverted sound engineer used to working on nature documentaries is recruited by an Italian director, only to find himself working on a violent horror movie. The alien surroundings and constant repetition of disturbing imagery begins to take its toll on his sanity. Thriller, starring Toby Jones, Tonia Sotiropoulou and Antonio Mancino

programme.title: Baggage Claim (2013)
programme.desc: An air hostess is horrified at the thought of her younger sister getting married while she is still single. She realises her job gives her access to eligible men from across America, and begins clocking up thousands of air miles as she scours the country for a potential fiance. Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs

programme.title: The Spiderwick Chronicles (2008)
programme.desc: Life for identical twins Jared and Simon and their sister Mallory begins afresh when their mother inherits a spooky mansion. But after moving in, strange things begin to happen, and as the youngsters investigate, they discover a book that opens up a mysterious world of amazing supernatural creatures. Fantasy adventure, starring Freddie Highmore in a dual role alongside Sarah Bolger and Nick Nolte

programme.title: Carry On Cabby (1963)
programme.desc: The neglected wife of a workaholic taxi owner grows increasingly tired of his lack of interest in their marriage. In a ploy to bring him to his senses, she secretly launches a rival cab firm with a driver roster made up of attractive women, who soon tempt his customers away. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Connor and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: Hail, Caesar! (2016)
programme.desc: An executive in 1950s Hollywood is employed to bury scandals, solve problems and ensure everything goes to plan for the studio. In one fraught day, he has to contend with the kidnapping of the leading man from the set of an ancient Roman epic, a musical star's secret pregnancy, and a director who objects to having a miscast actor forced on him. The Coen brothers' comedy, starring Josh Brolin, George Clooney, Scarlett Johansson and Ralph Fiennes

programme.title: The Monuments Men (2014)

They are sent into occupied Europe to recover priceless works of art that have fallen into Nazi hands and ensure the masterpieces survive the conflict. Fact-based drama, directed by and starring George Clooney. With Matt Damon, Bill Murray and Cate Blanchett

programme.title: The Martian (2015)
programme.desc: A manned mission to Mars is abruptly abandoned, with one crew member left for dead. However, the astronaut has survived and faces a series of challenges - to contact Earth and arrange his rescue and to survive for the years it will take for a spacecraft to reach him on resources intended to last the crew a month. Ridley Scott's sci-fi drama based on the novel by Andy Weir, starring Matt Damon, Jessica Chastain, Kristen Wiig and Chiwetel Ejiofor

programme.title: Solace (2015)

Crime thriller, starring Anthony Hopkins, Colin Farrell and Jeffrey Dean Morgan

programme.desc: For his first task back in the field, Jeffords prepares to join Peralta and Boyle on a mission to infiltrate a gym where steroids are being sold illegally, but Peralta begins to have second thoughts about whether the sergeant is ready. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.desc: Adam manages to drag his reluctant father to a doctor, and ends up finding out more about his dad's state of health than he had expected. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry seeks fresh inspiration when he loses his standing as a champion athlete at school and attempts to introduce a new sport to his friends. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Part two of two. The demon bikers terrorise the town, disrupting the ritual to bring Buffy back to life. programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer

programme.title: Rick and Morty

programme.title: The Jellies!
programme.desc: Everyone is in peril, with the end of the world just mere moments away. Can Cornell help humanity to win a deadly galactic war?

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick turns himself into a pickle in one of his crazy experiments. Meanwhile, Beth, Summer and Morty attend family therapy sessions prompted by the school

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is asked to help co-ordinate the school's Duke of Edinburgh award scheme, but instead of carrying out his duties, he turns the situation to his advantage and tries to flirt with a university student. Meanwhile, Simon faces problems when his parents separate. Simon Bird and Joe Thomas star

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will becomes stressed as the friends prepare for their exams - apart from Jay, who finds himself preoccupied. Simon makes progress with Carli by helping her revise, and they all reminisce about the events of the past year. Comedy, starring Simon Bird

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard meets up with the woman he kissed during his trip in the hope of setting Penny's mind at ease, while Sheldon films a special episode of Fun with Flags after his break-up with Amy. Bernadette feels guilty about keeping a secret from Penny

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys' science skills are put to the test when they get a flat tyre during Leonard's surprise bachelor party weekend in Mexico. Meanwhile, the girls finally force Penny to break the news to her family that she has eloped with Leonard. Keith Carradine guest stars

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Self-conscious groom-to-be Richard plans a first-class trip for his straight-talking bride Latrice on her wedding day

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry badgers Murray into getting him a puppy, but he is upset when the dog takes more of a liking to his father than to him. Beverly wants to join in with Erica and Lainey's pyjama party, but when the girls exclude her from the gathering she soon finds a way to eavesdrop on them

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly tries to get Murray to invite his grouchy father to Thanksgiving dinner, but her brother-in-law Marvin interferes. Barry and Erica compete when it is suggested they should give the holiday toast. Judd Hirsch (Taxi) guest stars

programme.desc: The first hosts in north London, recently engaged couple Anita and Cash, serve up a menu that draws on their Indian heritage. Dan and Les, who've been married for 17 years, host last. Self-confessed food snob Dan has devised a starter with eight separate elements. Will their risky choices and haute cuisine appeal to their guests?

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Ash wants to pull off 'the most romantic wedding ever', but his bride-to-be Vicki shuns anything corny

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Dean faces Tracey's parents and tells them of his betrayal. Gabrielle's decision to stay in a rental apartment instead of her home proves disastrous when Nasser refuses to move in

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.desc: While investigating a string of hotel robberies together, Peralta is upset to discover Santiago is considering leaving the precinct to work with his rival, the Vulture, in the special crimes unit. programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard inadvertently gives the impression he is attracted to Amy when he accompanies her to a colleague's wedding. Meanwhile, Howard tries to persuade Bernadette they should live with his mother after getting married and suggests a trial run of the arrangement over the weekend

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: When a client doesn't want Don to attend a big meeting, Adam goes to great lengths to protect his brother's feelings. Meanwhile, Andi kisses up to Mrs Rodriguez to ensure Emme gets the best teacher for first grade

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi borrow money from Joe to help with a cash flow problem, but they soon regret it

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As they bond over their shared love for the movie Dirty Dancing, Beverly is thrilled when Erica suggests the film as the theme for the upcoming school dance. However, Principal Ball refuses to sanction anything with the word 'dirty' in the title, threatening Erica with suspension if she persists with the idea. Barry lobbies for the dance to be based on his favourite movie Footloose, while Adam and Pops encourage Murray to learn to dance in order to make Beverly happy

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam joins a mail-order music club, aiming to assemble an enviable cassette tape collection. He takes advantage of the 12 tapes for a penny promotion by opening multiple accounts with the club using fake names to get as much music as possible, but has no intention of continuing the monthly contracts. However, when Beverly discovers the scam she blames Erica. Barry asks Murray for help when he realises Lainey's dad Bill doesn't like him.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Mary takes a job as church secretary, she finds herself becoming a marriage counsellor to Pastor Jeff. Sheldon and Missy spend their first afternoon at home alone. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Raegan Revord

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon makes friends with an upper-class senior pupil who introduces him to a new field of science. Meanwhile, Mary and George disagree on how to handle Sheldon's blossoming social life

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy gets to grips with normal life, finding herself with a flooded basement and a financial crisis on her hands. programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Man with a Plan

programme.title: Man with a Plan

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly tries to bond with other mothers to form their own friendship group, and Geoff's romantic gestures begin to annoy Erica

Geoff soon discovers that dinner with the Goldbergs is no ordinary meal out: the family repeatedly change tables, Murray insists Adam order from the children's menu, the food is sent back to the kitchen, and Barry wants to amend his order but Beverly won't allow it. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, David Schwimmer, Chris Rock, Jada Pinkett Smith and Sacha Baron Cohen

programme.title: First Dates

programme.desc: Angel goes shopping with Stephanie and shows her the best way to frame her father's original artwork using modern and antique fabric. Justin and Annabelle put up their newly renovated exterior chateau shutters, but the numbering seems to have gone a bit haywire, so getting the shutters on the right windows proves a challenge

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Sally and John Lane, who plan to build an energy-efficient kit home in Over, Cambridgeshire, that will be made in Germany and then shipped to their plot for assembly. The couple also visit a similar-style property in Hertfordshire for ideas and inspiration

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the musically themed Harmony B&B in Torquay, Devon, begin the competition, trying to prove their establishment offers the best value for money. Dutch hosts Hans MacDaniel and Monica van der Meij try to impress their guests, but it remains to be seen what they will make of wheelchair badminton, saxophones at breakfast and a controversial sausage

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest continues at Chimneys B&B in North Walsham, Norfolk, where owners Jenny and Richard Harmer's decision to use a flag as a tablecloth angers Hans MacDaniel and Monica Van Der Meij. The argument seems to abate during an afternoon canoeing session - only to resurface at breakfast the following day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Beverley Conoley and Caroline Pocklington host at the Wordsworth Hotel in Cockermouth, Cumbria. They take their guests to a spa and Hans MacDaniel happily volunteers for a spray tan, while Richard Harmer is far more uncomfortable as he finds himself on a massage table. The day ends with dinner at a nearby bistro, but Jenny Harmer complains about the temperature

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother and daughter Lesley and Emily Gray play host at the Park Farm Guest House in Gateshead, but while the evening's entertainment featuring a ride on a two-wheeled personal transporter goes down well among the guests, tensions simmer when the dinner conversation turns to a delicate issue

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Thirty seven-year-old elephant Thi is pregnant for the ninth time but the keepers believe she is now three months' overdue. The risks for Thi and her unborn calf are growing by the day, and the staff are worried. Rampant male Rothschild giraffe Meru causes problems for the giraffe herd as he relentlessly chases the females, and male clownfish Polo gets injured while fighting with the other males for the attentions of dominant female Rosie. However, clownfish can change sex at will, and Polo's time alone in an isolation tank produces a surprising side effect

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer come to the aid of the Oberoi family from Harrow, whose house has a fridge freezer and in the hallway and a single room for their two children. Kirstie comes up with a plan to expand the kitchen and make the lounge more welcoming, while Phil shows them some of the other homes on the market

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

Justin and Annabelle must get busy to complete rooms in time for a visit from Justin's 95-year-old grandmother. Jayne and Steve battle with a giant four poster bed for the master en suite bedroom, but with a little help from some friends, manage to complete another room

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Ben and Rachel Hammond have spent a year searching London for somewhere exciting to live with their two daughters, and they have finally stumbled on a 1950s home on a unique plot, situated within the leafy depths of a park in the south of the city. The only problem is the house itself - an ugly, inefficient and uninspiring property - and their solution is to radically transform it into a sleek, modernist masterpiece. But this is no easy task, as Kevin McCloud finds out

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ruth and Margaret Dugdall welcome their rivals to Castle Lodge Hotel in Felixstowe, Suffolk. Ed Prophet plays a series of tricks on Gordon McCallum in the hope of making him smile, but previous hosts David Lewis and Giles Beaton are unimpressed when the prankster takes on the role of waiter

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Gordon and Sandra McCallum host at Bryn Woodlands House in Colwyn Bay, Conwy, where they take the group harness racing. Ed Prophet worries about getting manure on his face, and later receives a shock. Margaret and Ruth Dugdall think the B&B's decor is poor, and Giles Beaton has a problem with a bottle of ketchup

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Edward Prophet and fiancee Rachel Pickup play host at the Tollemache Arms in Cheshire as the week's competition enters the final round. The couple pull out all the stops to charm their guests, but their efforts are undermined by a shambolic breakfast service

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: As the contestants prepare to discover which of their establishments has won the competition, the owners of Langland Road are shocked by a peculiar payment, and begin to suspect something is amiss. The Castle Lodge hoteliers are dismayed when criticism is directed towards their new wallpaper, and the proprietors of Bryn Woodland House struggle to face up to their shortcomings

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chimp Zee Zee gives birth to a daughter and keepers hope her arrival will have a calming influence on the others. Meanwhile, chameleon Mr Parsons is set up with a young female, banteng mother Naya struggles to bond with her newly born calf, and elephant Nadita should be looking after baby Anjan, but would rather play with her boisterous cousin, Aayu

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Brixworth, Northamptonshire, rugby fan Ian wants to leave the property that he and wife Sarah bought together two years ago. With a toddler and a couple of dogs, their two-bed rural semi is bursting at the seams. However, Sarah believes the house has the potential to cater for a growing family and wants to stay - if they can sort out their dingy ground floor. Kirstie wants to open up the downstairs and drive a digger through the conservatory, but will Ian and Sarah like the idea?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie finishes her mother Isobel's apartment. Painted and decorated, it now has her fathers framed pictures on the walls, a stunning 200-year-old mahogany canopy, plus furniture. Elsewhere, Jayne and Steve finish the Oriental Room and are ready to take in guests

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets a master craftsman whose dream is to build a castle in rural Devon made entirely of mud. Kevin McCabe plans to form the huge property out of two vast curved roundhouses - the largest of which is inspired by the natural geometry of a snail shell - connected by glazing and topped with wildflower meadow roofs to mirror the surrounding countryside. However, the project involves mixing and laying a mind-boggling 2,000 tons of cob, all during warm, sunny weather - and the sheer scale of the task soon becomes clear

programme.title: Code 37: Sex Crimes
programme.desc: Part two of two. After the main suspect is murdered, the team is at a loss on how best to proceed. However, the case takes an interesting turn when Lily delivers her baby and Max turns up at the hospital. In her personal quest, Hannah can't believe her eyes when she finally meets her brother Bart, who has surprising news for her. Belgian crime thriller, starring Veerle Baetens, Michael Pas, Darya Gantura and Valentijn Dhaenens. In Flemish

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tensions run high at King's College Hospital when police suspect a patient is concealing a weapon, while 58-year-old mother-of-four Hillary arrives in resus with a severe head injury after falling from her horse. Icylyn's bloated abdomen baffles the medical team and she has to wait overnight for a diagnosis, and 14-year-old Chloe receives treatment following her involvement in a fight

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Sister Jen is on duty in resus looking after 48-year-old Bobby, who has been suffering from seizures at home. Bobby has spent most of his adult life in prison for a number of violent crimes including murder. Meanwhile, 70-year-old Ronald had to cut short his 46th wedding anniversary celebrations after experiencing breathing difficulties, and Rienelle, seven, receives treatment after falling from the top of a climbing frame at school

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part edition, Gordon Ramsay heads to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, an Italian restaurant run by sisters Rita and Lisa. The pair grew up working at their father's eatery nearby, but when they opened their own business, they couldn't replicate his success, and they now blame their failure on everything from the weather to the tablecloths

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Liz and Robin Leonard, an actress and retired banker, who plan to self-build a three-bedroom home with views over the Sussex coastline. The couple hope they can create their dream home for £90,000 less than it might cost to buy a similarly sized property in the area

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tensions run high at King's College Hospital when police suspect a patient is concealing a weapon, while 58-year-old mother-of-four Hillary arrives in resus with a severe head injury after falling from her horse. Icylyn's bloated abdomen baffles the medical team and she has to wait overnight for a diagnosis, and 14-year-old Chloe receives treatment following her involvement in a fight

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: A sense of dread descends on Craggy Island as the priests prepare for poker-faced Father Stone's annual visit - and Ted tries desperately to think of a scheme to get rid of him. Clerical comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Devon County Show, where she tries to impress the judges with scones and unconventional kumquat eclairs in the afternoon tea tent, which is famed for its competitive atmosphere

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Lincolnshire couple Peter and Diane Bates, who have long dreamt of enjoying a Mediterranean lifestyle in Spain, showing them traditional properties for under £35,000 in the province of Malaga

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Devon couple Steven and Jennie Flowers want to buy a holiday home that can also double up as a rental investment on the western Costa del Sol in Spain. Will they be drawn towards a two-bedroom flat near fashionable Estepona or will they be won over by a frontline beach house a little further west?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Deborah Sims has long dreamt of relocating permanently to southern Spain. With a budget of £90,000, she is looking for a property in the Manilva region, with an easy commute to Gibraltar. It's a big lifestyle change to make on her own, so it's important that presenter Sara Demergi finds the ideal property that can help start the next chapter of Deborah's life

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house hunting in Essex and Hertfordshire. Kirstie searches for a family home for couple Justin and Christie, who have spent the first five years of their relationship living 50 miles apart, and are desperate to finally live together and start a family. Phil helps Cara and Ben search for a family home near Bishop's Stortford

programme.title: Grand Designs Revisited
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits a couple who hoped to restore a dilapidated Georgian house in London to its former glory. Once 200 years of redecoration and refurbishment had been stripped away, the property boasted elegant period features, but the pair still had to overcome daunting interior decay problems

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ptol Slattery hosts the first dinner party in Winchester, Hampshire, but his menu of seared scallops, lamb steak with baby new potatoes followed by chocolate mousse leaves his guests - waitress Patrician Pearson, DJ Francis Leigh, care-home worker Georgia Groves and estate agent William Tilsley - underwhelmed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Francis Leigh hosts the third dinner party in Winchester, hoping to dazzle his guests with his sunburnt chicken curry, a Thai meal with a twist and a dessert simply called 'sticky.' The entertainment for the night proves to be weird and wonderful as he dons a tutu and fur coat to serve the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Waitress Patricia Pearson hosts the second party in Winchester, but the decision to write her menu in Spanish causes confusion for one guest who mistakes lamb for llama. The Peruvian-themed feast is followed by a rendition of the country's national anthem and a traditional dance involving a candle and a donkey's jaw

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth night of the competition in Winchester, Georgia Groves plans a black-tie evening complete with a red carpet, posh frocks and a spray-tan booth. It appears to be going well until Patricia Pearson reveals what she thinks of Ptol Slattery and his wine antics

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent William Tilsley throws one last dinner party as a week of competitions in Winchester, Hampshire, draws to a close. The host plans to offer his guests a vegetarian menu, with a blind food-tasting game providing the evening's entertainment. As the night draws to a close, one of the competitors rises above the rest to become the winner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Anglesey, where best pals Richard Tuke and Susan Hatch hope to show that Blackthorn Farm B&B, which they own, is better than any of their guests' establishments. However, they find that their close friendship is scrutinised even more than their property

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The White Swan Hotel in Yeadon, West Yorkshire, is the second stop of the competition, and owners Graham and Barbara Yellow hope their basic facilities and affordable prices will please their guests. Spiritual couple Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor get good vibes from their room, Rachel Lonergan views the hosts in a new light and breakfast is well received by the contestants, despite having to pay a supplement fee

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Vegetarians Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor host at the Old Mill House B&B in Bridport, Dorset, and both come under attack at dinner when Malcolm voices his opinions on meat eating. In the morning, a meditation session gets a mixed response, and most of the guests are left cold by the vegetarian buffet breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Rachel and Dan Lonergan welcome their guests to the Brighton Inn, East Sussex, where they hope to offer a luxury, boutique experience. Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor give their room a thorough inspection, before the groups learns the art of building a human pyramid in the afternoon's activity. At breakfast, they discover a lack of vegetarian alternatives, and the hosts suspect game-playing when they are shocked by some negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together to confront their rivals and find out how much they have been paid. Richard and Susan are keen to tackle the bathroom issues of Barbara and Graham, who bask in the comments from Malcolm and Fiona. The Old Mill House proprietors defend their vegetarian breakfast routine, but serve up snobby feedback to Rachel and Dan from the Brighton Inn

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Michael Butcher and Phil Palmer want to bring a touch of urban glamour to their new home at Christmas Farm near Newbury, Berkshire, by creating a modern farmhouse that combines an open-plan party pad with functional spaces below. As the builders set to work on the handcrafted flint exterior, complete with a vast trapezoid window, the pair juggle construction with farming the land, and in an attempt to make the project work financially, they set up a microbrewery in the barn. Kevin McCloud follows their progress

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Registrar Ling is concerned about 23-year-old David, who has been brought to King's College Hospital after having seizures for 30 minutes and isn't responding to drugs. Ling weighs up the benefits of putting him into an induced coma to stop the attacks. Meanwhile, 49-year-old Suzette is brought in following an accident involving a cyclist, and Selin is accompanied by her best friend Maria to receive treatment for a cut

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The team treats 78-year-old Kevin, who suffered a cardiac arrest at the gym and fortunately received life-saving treatment at the scene from an instructor trained to use a portable defibrillator. Meanwhile, 23-year-old paramedic Declan is sent for an emergency CT scan, and Monica, 83, is experiencing numbness in her leg following a fall at home, and her initial X-ray appears to indicate she has a broken neck

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Bishop Brennan orders Ted and Dougal to campaign against a controversial film - but as a result of their protest it becomes the biggest box-office hit in Craggy Island's history. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly and Pauline McLynn

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The attractive author of a steamy novel comes to stay on Craggy Island - and it is not long before Ted mistakenly jumps to the conclusion that she has fallen for him. Guest starring Gemma Craven

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with guest captain Kathy Burke and Roisin Conaty taking on guest captain Johnny Vegas and Bob Mortimer. John Cooper Clarke joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters
